metadata.name: AKS Rightsizing - OOMKilled pods
metadata.description: Detect OOMKilled containers from Container Insights pod inventory.

queries.text: Pods with OOMKilled status over lookback window
queries.graph: KubePodInventory | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) | where ContainerStatusReason =~ 'OOMKilled' or PodStatus =~ 'Failed' | project Namespace, WorkloadName = Name, ContainerName, PodStatus, ContainerStatusReason, compliant = false
